text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Tuesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, October 01. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that i'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Here is what I recommend. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. CareConnect prep is moving along. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
